export class TaxiOpenListParser{constructor(){this._currentRoomId=0;this._currentVrid=0;this._destinations=[];}flush(){this._destinations=[];this._currentRoomId=0;this._currentVrid=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Header: player's current position
this._currentRoomId=wrapper.readInt();this._currentVrid=wrapper.readInt();// Destination list
const total=wrapper.readInt();this._destinations=new Array(total);for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const roomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualRoomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualName=wrapper.readString();const userCount=wrapper.readInt();// new field for occupancy
this._destinations[i]={roomId,virtualRoomId,virtualName,userCount};}return true;}/** Getter for parsed data */get destinations(){return this._destinations;}/** Current user's room ID (for "You are here" marker) */get currentRoomId(){return this._currentRoomId;}/** Current user's virtual room ID (for "You are here" marker) */get currentVrid(){return this._currentVrid;}}
